column6: The app utilizes GoRouter effectively for navigation. Screens adapt well to the mobile form factor. State management via Provider is smooth and handles loading states correctly.
column7: No major UI changes needed.

column6: Most forms have standard validation. However email validation uses a simple '@' check and passwords only check minimum length.
column7: Enhance RegExp for email validation and add password complexity rules.

column6: Almost all user flows are wired up correctly with the exception of 'Forgot Password'.
column7: Wire up the Forgot Password button with SupabaseService.resetPassword().

column6: Foreign keys and data structures for users vehicles bookings payments and reviews are optimally designed.
column7: None.

column6: All tables currently have RLS disabled exposing the entire database to anyone with the anon key.
column7: CRITICAL: Enable RLS on all 6 tables and write appropriate access policies immediately before production.

column6: Online payments are simulated without any actual gateway verification. Transactions are marked as successful locally.
column7: Integrate a real payment gateway (Razorpay/Stripe) and use webhooks/edge functions for secure verification.

column6: Supabase Authentication correctly integrated. User sessions are persisted and profile creation triggers correctly on signup.
column7: None.

column6: The platform is functionally complete from A to Z for a beta/demo environment but requires critical security and payment integrations before public launch.
column7: 1. Fix RLS 2. Add Payment Gateway 3. Secure environment variables 4. Fix async gap context issue.
